steps.title: Apply range and homogeneity
steps.content: Previous research says species with narrow geographic ranges are more genetically homogeneous than species with extensive ranges. Since M. anniana is narrow-ranging and the simulation expands it to new habitats, consistency with the research means less homogeneity over time.

steps.title: Reject wrong species claims
steps.content: Choice A discusses Mammillaria species in neighboring states and gives the wrong direction. Choice B concerns other species becoming common in Tamaulipas. Choice C also focuses on other species surviving there, not M. anniana's genetic change. The answer is D.
